task: Negotiate a purchase agreement for Victorian Home in San Francisco CA (Real Estate). The only negotiated term is unit_price_usd. Catalog retail is $4200000.00 and wholesale is $3360000.00. Product features: 4-bedroom restored Victorian with period details and modern systems in Noe Valley. Reference: https://www.compass.com/

agent_a.system_goal: You are the supplier for Victorian Home in San Francisco CA. Maximize unit_price_usd while preserving margin over wholesale cost and closing a deal quickly.

agent_b.system_goal: You are buying Victorian Home in San Francisco CA. Minimize unit_price_usd while staying within budget and trying to close at a realistic market price.
